name: Gestao Hospital
description:
description='The project, titled "GestaoHospital," is a Hospital Management System designed to enhance the efficiency and effectiveness of public health services in Brazil, specifically within the framework of the Sistema Único de Saúde (SUS). Its primary objective is to create an API that facilitates the organization and management of hospital resources, thereby improving patient care and resource allocation.

The system addresses several challenges faced by hospitals, such as managing patient admissions, tracking available beds, and maintaining an inventory of medical supplies, including blood products. By providing a centralized platform, the system aims to streamline operations, reduce waste, and ensure that hospitals can respond effectively to patient needs.

Key functionalities of the system include:
- Registering hospitals and their details.
- Identifying the nearest hospital for patients based on their location.
- Managing patient check-ins and check-outs.
- Monitoring bed availability within hospitals.
- Managing inventory of medical supplies and blood products.
- Facilitating communication between hospitals to share resources when necessary.

Overall, the GestaoHospital project seeks to leverage technology to support the public health system, ensuring that healthcare services are accessible, efficient, and responsive to the needs of the population.'
highLevelGoals: Enable hospital administrators to efficiently manage hospital operations and resources through a centralized platform, ensuring effective resource allocation and reducing waste.
Facilitate healthcare providers in tracking patient admissions, managing check-ins and check-outs, and monitoring bed availability to enhance patient care and ensure timely treatment.
Allow patients to easily identify and access the nearest hospital based on their location, ensuring timely medical care and improving patient outcomes.
Provide inventory managers with tools to effectively manage and track medical supplies and blood products, ensuring availability when needed and minimizing waste.
Support public health officials in overseeing and improving public health services through data-driven insights, resource management, and ensuring compliance with health regulations.
Enable inter-hospital coordinators to facilitate communication and resource sharing between hospitals to optimize resource allocation and improve overall healthcare delivery.
Implement robust data security measures and compliance with privacy standards to safeguard sensitive healthcare information and ensure patient confidentiality.
lowLevelGoals: This allows administrators to have a real-time overview of hospital performance and resource usage.
This functionality helps in managing the structure and resource allocation of the hospital effectively.
This allows healthcare providers to make informed decisions regarding patient care and resource allocation.
This ensures accurate tracking of patient flow and resource utilization in the hospital.
This helps patients find the nearest hospital quickly in case of emergencies.
This provides patients with information on what services they can access at the hospital.
This ensures that inventory levels are monitored continuously to prevent shortages.
This helps in proactive management of inventory to avoid shortages.
This supports data-driven decision-making for public health initiatives.
This ensures that hospitals are adhering to necessary health standards and regulations.
This facilitates collaboration and resource optimization among hospitals.
This ensures transparency and accountability in resource sharing.
This ensures that only authorized personnel can access sensitive data, maintaining patient confidentiality.
This protects patient data from unauthorized access and breaches.
